name: Vuzix Corp
summary: Vuzix Corporation, incorporated in Delaware in 1997, designs, manufactures, and markets AI-enabled smart glasses, waveguides, and augmented reality (AR) display technologies. Products include near-eye displays, heads-up displays, and wearable computing devices for enterprise, medical, defense, security, and select consumer markets. The company also provides proprietary waveguide optics and display engines for ODM and OEM partners, maintaining in-house waveguide manufacturing and an IP portfolio built over 28 years.
